decision.rationale: The plate honors IR.sean.hair.dirty-blonde-volume: the hair color is dirty-blonde, it is full and textured on top, tapered at the sides and back, and the ear is completely unobscured in the profile views. However, the plate only partially honors IR.sean.hair.front-quiff-cowlick: while a forward-curling quiff/cowlick is visible at the front hairline, it is not the highest point of the head silhouette in either the front or profile views; the top-middle volume of the hair rises higher than the front cowlick.
